title: Fundamental Model for Compressor Cavity Heat Transfer: Theory and Validation
abstract: Abstract The buoyancy-driven flow inside compressor cavities is three-dimensional, unsteady and features a large range of time- and length-scales. The temperature and rotation of the fluid core of the cavity are influenced by an exchange of enthalpy and momentum with an axial throughflow of cooling air at low radius. The complexity of the flow and conjugate nature of the heat transfer creates a challenge for the aero-engine designer when calculating thermal stresses, radial expansion, and blade-tip clearances. This paper presents a low-order model to predict the disc and fluid-core temperatures, and the mass exchange to the rotating cavity. Fundamental physical principles and experimental data are used to create a single set of Rayleigh-Grashof correlations for heat transfer and radial mass flow of buoyant plumes. The model is applied to eleven test cases from experimental rigs at Bath, Dresden and Sussex, each with unique instrumentation, thermal boundary conditions, geometries and throughflow swirl. Empirical correlations for exchange and recirculation mass flow were determined for each rig using a common theoretical methodology. The model captures the heat and mass transfer characteristics with accuracy quantified relative to experimental data. New experimental data from the Bath Compressor Cavity Rig is used to validate the model under conditions of asymmetrical heating, demonstrating the effects associated with the axial gradient of temperature in the compressor are captured appropriately. The consistent agreement with experimental data demonstrates a robust framework appropriate for application to thermo-mechanical design codes in the aero-engine.
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种低阶模型，基于瑞利-格拉晓夫相关性预测压气机腔体中的盘和流体核心温度及质量交换。模型利用基础物理原理和实验数据，应用于多个实验案例，验证了其在不对称加热条件下的准确性，为航空发动机热机械设计提供了稳健框架。
relevance_reason: 论文涉及压气机腔体热传递和叶尖间隙相关热应力，但核心方向是热传递建模而非直接针对稳定性或叶尖间隙畸变。
innovation: 开发了统一的瑞利-格拉晓夫相关性模型，用于预测浮力驱动流动中的热质传递，并首次在不对称加热条件下验证。
conclusions: 模型能准确捕捉热质传递特性，与实验数据一致；适用于航空发动机热机械设计代码。

title: IMPACT OF NOZZLE GUIDE VANE TRAILING EDGE DAMAGE ON HIGH PRESSURE TURBINE STAGE PERFORMANCE
abstract: Abstract In this paper we consider the impact of nozzle guide vane trailing edge burn-back (damage) on cooled high-pressure turbine stage performance. We analyse four levels of simulated burn-back ranging from new parts to severely damaged. The burn-back geometries are based on a statistical analysis of real deterioration data from operating engines. We use unsteady stage simulations to predict the impact of burn-back on capacity, reaction, specific work, and efficiency, among other performance metrics. For CFD validation, we use experimental data from the Engine Component Aero-Thermal (ECAT) facility at the University of Oxford. This is a full-annular nozzle guide vane cascade, operating at engine-matched conditions of Mach and Reynolds number. The overall purpose of this study is to improve understanding of the impact of burn-back on whole-life engine performance.
summary_zh: 本文研究了高压涡轮导向叶片尾缘烧蚀损伤对涡轮级性能的影响。基于发动机实际退化数据的统计分析，模拟了四种烧蚀程度，采用非定常级模拟预测了烧蚀对流量、反力度、比功和效率等性能指标的影响，并通过牛津大学ECAT实验数据验证CFD。核心发现是烧蚀损伤会显著降低涡轮级效率，具体影响程度随烧蚀水平增加而加剧。
method: 采用非定常级CFD模拟，基于发动机匹配的马赫数和雷诺数工况，结合ECAT全环导向叶栅实验数据进行验证。
innovation: 基于真实发动机退化数据的统计分析来模拟烧蚀几何，结合非定常模拟和全环实验验证，提高了对涡轮部件全寿命性能影响的理解。
conclusions: 烧蚀损伤导致涡轮级效率下降，具体下降幅度随烧蚀程度增加而增大；烧蚀还影响流量和反力度等关键性能参数。
limitations: 研究聚焦于导向叶片烧蚀，未考虑其他部件损伤或整机交互效应，且模拟基于特定发动机数据，通用性可能受限。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及涡轮性能分析，与压气机稳定性、叶尖间隙等核心方向间接相关，但非直接聚焦。

title: Design Optimization of Complex Total Pressure Distortion Screens for Gas Turbine Engine Testing
abstract: Abstract In a gas turbine engine, inlet flow distortion occurs due to factor-s such as flow separation in the aircraft inlet due to aircraft manoeuvres and flight conditions. The distorted flow significantly impacts the performance of compressor and reduces efficiency of the gas turbine engine. In a compressor ground test facility, distortion screens are employed to simulate the distorted inlet flow experienced in flight conditions. In the present work, a methodology is developed to design complex total pressure distortion screens. Firstly, the total pressure loss characteristics of uniform porosity screens are evaluated by computations for screen porosities ranging from 0.20 to 0.90, and inlet Mach numbers ranging from 0.20 to 0.65. The influence of porosity on the total pressure loss for various inlet Mach numbers is highlighted in both incompressible and compressible flow regimes. Secondly, an inverse design methodology is formulated with the objective function to minimize the difference between the required and achieved total pressure patterns. Finally, this inverse design methodology is posed as an optimization problem, which is then iteratively solved using a gradient-based method until the required total pressure pattern is obtained. The proposed design optimization methodology is tested for several cases including actual gas turbine distortion patterns. The present work resulted in a robust design framework that can be utilized to design distortion screens based on the required total pressure distortion pattern for arbitrary inlet Mach numbers.
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种设计复杂总压畸变屏的方法，用于模拟燃气轮机发动机测试中的进气畸变。通过计算评估均匀孔隙屏的总压损失特性，并基于逆设计方法优化屏结构，以最小化目标与实现总压模式的差异。该方法适用于任意进口马赫数，为畸变屏设计提供了稳健框架。
method: 数值计算与优化方法，评估孔隙率0.20-0.90、进口马赫数0.20-0.65下的总压损失，采用梯度法迭代求解逆设计问题。
innovation: 开发了基于逆设计的优化方法，能针对任意进口马赫数和复杂总压畸变模式设计畸变屏，提高了模拟精度和适用性。
conclusions: 孔隙率对总压损失有显著影响，在不可压缩和可压缩流态下均需考虑；优化方法能有效匹配目标总压模式，适用于实际燃气轮机畸变案例。
limitations: 研究基于数值模拟，未涉及实验验证；可能未考虑非定常流动或三维效应。
relevance_reason: 论文涉及畸变进气对压气机性能的影响，与用户研究方向部分相关，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙或稳定性建模。

title: ENHANCING BLADE DURABILITY TO FOREIGN OBJECT DAMAGE THROUGH MULTIDISCIPLINARY DESIGN OPTIMIZATION
abstract: Abstract Foreign Object Damage (FOD) poses a significant challenge to the durability of compressor blades in aero engines. Impacts from foreign objects can threaten structural integrity and increase maintenance costs. This study presents a multidisciplinary optimization approach to improve rotor blade durability against FOD while preserving aerodynamic performance. A fully automatic aero-structural process chain is developed, combining finite element and computational fluid dynamics analyses. The optimization uses the meta-heuristic algorithm AutoOpti to maximize the allowable stress concentration factor Kt along FOD-sensitive regions without compromising aerodynamic efficiency and stability. The 1.5-front stage of an axial high-pressure compressor serves as a test case, focusing on critical rotor areas. The results show a significant improvement in FOD robustness, with optimized designs achieving up to a 42% increase in allowable Kt and improved surge margin. This work aims to investigate essential design factors for FOD-resistant airfoils using a multidisciplinary framework, providing insights into the impact of design variables on rotor robustness. The developed methodology has broad applicability for addressing the issue of FOD robustness during the design phase and is applied for a test case in this work.
summary_zh: 本文针对航空发动机压气机叶片的外物损伤问题，提出了一种多学科设计优化方法，结合有限元和计算流体动力学分析，使用AutoOpti元启发式算法优化转子叶片设计。研究以轴向高压压气机1.5级为案例，结果显示优化设计使允许应力集中因子Kt提升高达42%，并改善了喘振裕度，增强了叶片耐久性。
relevance_reason: 论文涉及压气机叶片优化和喘振裕度，与稳定性分析相关，但核心焦点是外物损伤而非压气机稳定性或叶尖间隙等核心方向。
innovation: 开发了全自动气动结构流程链，通过多学科优化在保持气动性能的同时，显著提升叶片对外物损伤的鲁棒性。
conclusions: 优化设计使允许应力集中因子Kt增加42%，并提高了喘振裕度。

title: Optimized Global Resolvent Analysis to Improve Plasma Actuator Control over the Airfoil Surface
abstract: This study explores the impact of a single dielectric-barrier discharge (SDBD) plasma actuator on the flow characteristics over a NACA0015 airfoil, focusing on the effects of varying forcing heights and frequencies. Using large-eddy simulation (LES) validated against experimental data, global resolvent analysis was integrated with spectral proper orthogonal decomposition (SPOD) to optimize the alignment between LES snapshots and resolvent response modes. Findings reveal that plasma actuator excitation below the response mode peak enhances trailing vortex structures, improving flow control. The study demonstrates that lower forcing frequencies and optimal plasma heights significantly enhance aerodynamic performance by reducing flow separation and improving lift-to-drag ratios. These insights contribute to developing more efficient active flow control strategies for applications in aircraft and wind turbine performance enhancement.
summary_zh: 本研究探讨了单介质阻挡放电等离子体激励器对NACA0015翼型流动特性的影响，重点关注激励高度和频率的变化。通过大涡模拟结合全局解析分析和谱本征正交分解，优化了模拟快照与解析响应模式的匹配。研究发现，低于响应模式峰值的等离子体激励能增强尾涡结构，改善流动控制，较低激励频率和最优激励高度可显著提升气动性能，减少流动分离并提高升阻比。
method: 采用大涡模拟（LES）结合全局解析分析和谱本征正交分解（SPOD），研究不同激励高度和频率的等离子体激励器工况。
innovation: 将全局解析分析与SPOD结合，优化LES快照与解析响应模式的匹配，以更精确地分析等离子体激励器对流动控制的影响。
conclusions: 等离子体激励器在低于响应模式峰值时能增强尾涡结构，改善流动控制；较低激励频率和最优激励高度可显著减少流动分离并提高升阻比。
limitations: 研究仅针对NACA0015翼型，未扩展到复杂三维压气机环境，可能限制了实际应用范围。
relevance_reason: 该研究涉及流动稳定性分析和数值方法，但与压气机稳定性、叶尖间隙畸变等核心方向关联较弱。

title: Vortex Evolution and Turbulence Dissipation During Leakage Flow in the Scallop Bionic Seal of Supercritical CO2 Turbomachinery Unit
abstract: Abstract The supercritical carbon dioxide (SCO2) Brayton cycle system is considered one of the most representative energy conversion systems of the future. Current seal solutions used in the SCO2 turbomachinery have difficulties in suppressing leakage of SCO2 with variable thermophysical properties in the gap between the rotor and the stator. The scallop bionic seal (SBS) is an innovative sealing solution for the SCO2 turbomachinery. The bionic cavities of the SBS promote vortex development and turbulence dissipation in the SCO2 leakage flow, improving the SBS’s sealing performance. However, the transient turbulence dissipation of the leakage flow inside the SBS subjected to rotor shear makes the experimental result deviate from its design objective. This research developed a high-order flow solver to analyze the transient behaviors of leakage flow inside SBS. The mechanism of vortex development on leakage flow turbulence dissipation is elucidated, and a novel correlation between the variation frequency in turbulence dissipation and the rotor’s rotational frequency is discovered. The results indicate that the spatial development of vortices under the rotor’s shearing action is the primary factor affecting turbulent dissipation. The helicity of leakage flow suggests that the vortices undergo merging, splitting, and shedding processes. There is a correlation between the change frequency in the leakage flow turbulent dissipation and the rotor rotation frequency, resulting in the frequency of periodic changes in the leakage rate of SBS being one-half of the rotor rotation frequency. This study supports the application of the SBS operating in the SCO2 turbomachinery unit.
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本研究针对超临界二氧化碳涡轮机械中的扇贝仿生密封，开发高阶流动求解器分析泄漏流的瞬态行为。揭示了转子剪切作用下涡旋发展对湍流耗散的机制，发现湍流耗散变化频率与转子旋转频率相关，导致泄漏率周期性变化频率为转子频率的一半。
relevance_reason: 论文涉及密封技术（机匣处理相关）和数值方法，但核心方向是密封而非压气机稳定性或叶尖间隙畸变。
innovation: 提出扇贝仿生密封用于超临界二氧化碳涡轮机械，通过高阶求解器分析泄漏流瞬态行为，发现湍流耗散与转子频率的新关联。
conclusions: 涡旋空间发展是影响湍流耗散的主要因素；泄漏流湍流耗散变化频率与转子旋转频率相关，泄漏率变化频率为转子频率的一半。

title: Experimental investigation on the effects of inlet circumferential distortion and optimized casing treatment in a transonic compressor
abstract: Abstract Casing treatment has been widely adopted to enhance the operating range of compressors by extending the stall margin. In this article, a high-precision experimental investigation is conducted in a transonic compressor with inlet circumferential distortion. Unsteady pressure is measured in the casing wall using a cluster of time-resolved transducers with axial and circumferential spatial resolution. The experimental data show that the optimized casing treatment improves the stall margin with minimal efficiency penalty for all measured inflow conditions. A comprehensive unsteady static pressure analysis indicates that the instability mode can be altered by inlet distortion. Shock structures and unsteadiness are affected by the inlet distortion, particularly in the exit of distorted region. Results of flow field structure analysis show that casing treatment can significantly modify the shock wave detachment, which is the primary stability enhancement mechanism of casing treatment. Furthermore, the implementation of casing treatment significantly enhances the disturbance tolerance of the compressor while effectively suppressing characteristic frequency bands induced by the unsteady fluctuation of tip leakage flow.
summary_zh: 本文通过高精度实验研究了跨音速压气机在进口周向畸变下的性能，采用轴向和周向空间分辨率的时间分辨传感器测量机匣壁面非定常压力。结果表明，优化机匣处理能显著提升失速裕度且效率损失最小，同时改变不稳定模式并改善激波分离，增强扰动容忍度并抑制叶尖泄漏流非定常波动引起的特征频带。
relevance_reason: 论文直接研究压气机稳定性、畸变进气与机匣处理，与核心方向高度匹配。
innovation: 结合进口周向畸变与优化机匣处理，通过高精度非定常压力测量揭示畸变对不稳定模式和激波结构的影响机制。
conclusions: 优化机匣处理在所有测量工况下提升失速裕度且效率损失最小；进口畸变能改变不稳定模式，机匣处理通过改善激波分离增强稳定性。

title: Numerical Evaluation of Morphing Busemann Inlet at Off-Design Angle of Attack
abstract: The performance of inward-turning scramjet inlets degrades at changes in angle of attack, limiting the potential maneuverability of vehicles that could use such inlets. The performance of a baseline, axisymmetric, inward-turning, truncated Busemann-style inlet designed for Mach 6 is characterized at off-design angles of attack using a Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes methodology, demonstrating the propensity to unstart. A morphing strategy is proposed in which the same inlet is bent near the throat to face the oncoming freestream as the angle of attack changes. The inlet-isolator performance for the morphed geometry at off-design angles of attack is shown to have substantially improved relative to the baseline. Performance metrics include total pressure recovery, flow distortion, and stream thrust. Grid insensitive solutions are obtained at each angle of attack using a systematic grid adaptation strategy. Susceptibility to unstart due to backpressure is also characterized for the baseline and morphed inlets.
summary_zh: 本文通过数值模拟研究了马赫6轴对称内转Busemann进气道在非设计攻角下的性能，发现其易发生不起动。提出一种变形策略，在喉部附近弯曲进气道以对准来流，显著改善了总压恢复、流动畸变和流推力等性能指标，并评估了背压敏感性。
method: 采用雷诺平均Navier-Stokes方法进行数值模拟，系统网格自适应策略确保网格无关解，工况包括非设计攻角和背压变化。
innovation: 创新点在于提出一种进气道变形策略，通过弯曲喉部区域自适应调整来流方向，相比固定几何进气道，在非设计攻角下显著提升性能。
conclusions: 变形进气道在非设计攻角下总压恢复、流动畸变和流推力性能大幅改善；背压敏感性降低，减少了不起动风险。
limitations: 研究基于数值模拟，未进行实验验证；变形策略可能增加机械复杂性，实际应用受限。
relevance_reason: 论文涉及流动畸变和稳定性分析（如不起动），但主要针对超燃冲压发动机进气道，与压气机气动热力学领域部分相关。

title: Loss Characteristics of Cantilevered Cascade With Moving Endwall Under Upstream Wake Influence
abstract: Abstract In multistage small-core compressors, the inflow conditions of cantilevered cascades exhibit considerable complexity. It is characterized by a larger ratio of tip clearance size to chord length and a larger ratio of wake width to pitch. These factors make it challenging to clarify the key influence of upstream wakes on large-clearance leakage flows within multistage environments. To take this challenge, this article incorporates realistic wake inflow and endwall rotation boundary conditions into the cascade simulations. Based on the wake observations of the multistage compressor (SJTU-LSRC), two sizes of cylinders were designed and positioned upstream of the controlled diffusion airfoil cascade to generate two distinct types of inflow wakes. One wake width is comparable to the multistage compressor wake width, and the other with an expanded width. By employing an unsteady numerical simulation method, the interaction between wake and cantilever cascade clearance leakage is decoupled and elucidated. The effects of different wakes on cascade losses and secondary flows were examined, including tip leakage flow evolution, mid-span flow mixing, and hub suction-side separation changes. Results show both wake widths stabilize clearance leakage flows. However, the wider wake induces significant mid-span mixing losses, increasing cascade entropy loss coefficients by 68% (large clearance) and 94% (small clearance) compared to the narrow wake. This study provides critical insights into small-core compressor flow mechanisms, aiding performance optimization and research advancement.
summary_zh: 本文通过非定常数值模拟，研究上游尾迹对悬臂叶栅叶尖间隙泄漏流的影响。基于多级压气机尾迹观测，设计两种宽度尾迹，分析其对叶栅损失和二次流的作用。结果表明，两种尾迹均能稳定泄漏流，但宽尾迹导致中跨混合损失显著增加，使熵损失系数大幅上升。
relevance_reason: 论文直接研究叶尖间隙泄漏流及其稳定性，与压气机稳定性分析相关，但未深入机匣处理或失速机理。
innovation: 结合真实尾迹流入和端壁旋转边界条件，模拟多级环境中上游尾迹对叶尖间隙泄漏流的影响，并解耦其相互作用。
conclusions: 宽尾迹使叶栅熵损失系数增加68%（大间隙）和94%（小间隙）；两种尾迹均能稳定叶尖间隙泄漏流。

title: Effect of Inlet Distortion Reduced Frequency on Centrifugal Compressor Performance and Stability
abstract: Characterizing the circumferential angle of inlet total pressure distortion by which a compressor responds in both performance and stability changes is paramount for inlet–gas turbine integration. Past computational simulations for centrifugal compressors have shown that the acoustic propagation time of information through the rotor passage over the dwell time of the rotor in the distorted state dictates this response to distortion. This is known as the acoustic reduced frequency, and a critical value has been shown computationally for centrifugal compressors to be unity. This effort utilizes the Single Stage Centrifugal Compressor at Purdue University to validate this critical value and behavior experimentally utilizing once-per-rev total pressure distortion screens. The compressor was mapped at 80, 90, and 100% corrected speed, which corresponded to subsonic, transonic, and supersonic relative-frame inlet flow Mach numbers. The efficiency of the compressor was minimally affected at transonic and supersonic operation by distortions with reduced frequencies greater than one and then exponentially decayed as distortion extents were increased, causing the reduced frequency to drop below unity. The compressor surged at the same numerical value of work coefficient for all inlet distortion configurations. The surge margin was minimally affected by distortion extents with reduced frequencies above one.
summary_zh: 本研究利用普渡大学单级离心压气机实验验证了进气总压畸变声学折减频率对性能与稳定性的影响。通过设置每转一次畸变屏，在80%、90%和100%校正转速下映射压气机性能。核心结论：当折减频率大于1时，畸变对效率和喘振裕度影响最小；折减频率低于1时，效率随畸变范围增加呈指数衰减，但所有畸变配置下喘振发生在相同功系数值。
relevance_reason: 论文直接研究进气畸变对压气机稳定性和性能的影响，与研究方向中的压气机稳定性和畸变进气高度相关。
innovation: 实验验证了离心压气机对进气畸变的声学折减频率临界值（约为1），补充了前人计算模拟结果，首次在实验中发现折减频率高于1时畸变影响最小。
conclusions: 折减频率大于1时，畸变对压气机效率和喘振裕度影响可忽略；所有进气畸变配置下，压气机在相同功系数值发生喘振。

title: Data-Driven Approaches for Thermocouple Conduction and Inertia Correction to Improve Engine Digital Twin Modeling
abstract: Abstract Digital engine twins duplicate the real existing, complex system by a digitally created construct representing its time-dependent characteristics. Based on real-time measured data, they provide information about the system state, which are not accessible by a data analysis. This makes accurate transient temperature measurements critical to digital engine twins. Thermocouples represent an established means of engine temperature measurement. However, they are affected by thermal inertia and conductive heat transfer, which introduce a bias and a time-delay of the sensor response. There are different physical phenomena leading to bias and time delay. Discussion of these phenomena makes it obvious that the transient reading of a thermocouple highly depends on its installation in the engine and the associated thermal environment. It is demonstrated that these distortions obscure the time series of measurements and complicate the distinction between nominal and non-nominal engine state. The time delay can be corrected a priori via a first-order time lag system based on basic physical properties. The potential of calibrating for the complex gas path flow conditions affecting the time lag is estimated using a physics-informed neural network. Matching the temperature readings completely to the model output indicates the amount of transient calibration data required to capture all effects due to the installation of the thermocouple in the engine structure.
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 该研究针对航空发动机数字孪生建模中热电偶温度测量的关键问题，分析了热惯性和导热效应导致的测量偏差与时间延迟。研究提出基于一阶时滞系统的先验校正方法，并利用物理信息神经网络估计复杂流场条件下的时间延迟校准潜力。核心发现表明，热电偶安装位置和热环境显著影响瞬态读数，需足够瞬态校准数据才能完全匹配模型输出。
method: 基于物理信息神经网络的数据驱动方法，结合一阶时滞系统理论校正，主要针对发动机复杂流场条件下的热电偶瞬态测量。
innovation: 将物理信息神经网络应用于热电偶时间延迟校准，结合先验物理模型与数据驱动方法，提高数字孪生建模中温度测量的准确性。
conclusions: 热电偶安装位置和热环境显著影响瞬态测量精度，需足够瞬态校准数据才能完全匹配模型输出；物理信息神经网络可有效估计复杂流场条件下的时间延迟校准潜力。
limitations: 研究未涉及具体发动机工况参数，且校准数据需求可能受安装条件限制。
relevance_reason: 该研究关注温度测量与数字孪生建模，虽涉及发动机状态监测，但与压气机稳定性、叶尖间隙等核心方向间接相关。

title: On the Performance of Common-Core Turboprops
abstract: Abstract Turboprops offer a promising pathway for sustainable aviation, as they can achieve high levels of propulsive efficiency and reduced installed drag compared to high bypass ratio turbofans. Turboprop engine cores, though, are rarely designed from scratch; instead, they remain geometrically similar and can be used across several engine variants, which is known as the concept of growth engines or core commonality. This paper investigates the impact of core commonality on the installed performance of the next generation small-core turboprops. First, a turboprop cycle design optimization is carried out based on a multipoint synthesis approach for 2035 entry into service assumptions. The propeller, nozzle, and engine core are individually designed and analyzed. Preliminary design studies of the core compressor are performed using a 2D streamline curvature algorithm, providing insights into the aerodynamic tradeoffs of highly loaded all-axial multistage compressors. The second part of this study examines the performance of growth engine variants by applying the common-core approach to the designed 2035 baseline turboprop engine. In this context, “growth” refers to increasing equivalent shaft power to meet the thrust demands of a derivative aircraft designed for higher passenger capacity and/or extended range. A common-core design methodology is developed and proposed, enabling power growth through zero-staging of the core compressor and power off-take from the free-power turbine to drive electric motors, which in turn power additional e-propellers in electrified turboprop variants. Three optimal growth engine designs are identified, achieving up to 34.8% power growth relative to the baseline turboprop while maintaining design constraints, including high-pressure spool overspeed limits, a fixed propeller design, and considerations for cooled or uncooled free-power turbines. Overall, this study systematically analyzes the common-core concept, reflecting the approach followed by engine manufacturers over the years.
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本文研究下一代小型核心涡桨发动机中核心通用性对安装性能的影响。采用多点综合方法进行涡桨循环设计优化，基于2035年服役假设，通过二维流线曲率算法初步设计核心压气机，分析高负荷全轴流多级压气机的气动权衡。提出核心通用设计方法，通过核心压气机零级化和自由动力涡轮功率提取实现功率增长，识别出三种最优增长发动机设计，功率增长最高达34.8%。
relevance_reason: 论文主要关注涡桨发动机核心通用性和功率增长，仅简要涉及压气机初步设计，与压气机稳定性、叶尖间隙畸变等核心方向关联较弱。
innovation: 提出核心通用设计方法，结合核心压气机零级化和自由动力涡轮功率提取，实现涡桨发动机功率增长，同时满足设计约束。
conclusions: 核心通用方法可实现高达34.8%的功率增长；二维流线曲率算法有效分析高负荷压气机的气动权衡。

title: Aerodynamic Performance Prognosis Of Operationally-Used Aero Engine Compressor Blading
abstract: Abstract The operational efficiency of aircraft engines is adversely affected over time due to degradation, manifesting as increased exhaust gas temperature (EGT) and thrust-specific fuel consumption (TSFC). Exceeding critical EGT limits necessitates an overhaul of the engine. During the maintenance of fan and compressor blades, adherence to specific limits outlined in the engine manual is crucial to ensure safe blade functionality. However, current practices lack established criteria for evaluating aerodynamic performance, particularly concerning which geometric parameters-such as leading and trailing edge thickness, chord length, tip clearance, as well as variations in lean and sweep-most significantly impact the performance. Consequently, the extent of engine performance degradation remains uncertain. This study aims to investigate the aerodynamic implications of geometric alterations in compressor blades following usage in a commonly deployed turbofan engine. Serviced blades, processed during maintenance, were digitized and parameterized. A design of experiments approach was employed to create a comprehensive array of synthetic compressor blades based on these parameter variations. Through computational fluid dynamics (CFD) analysis and integration into a fan and low-pressure compressor (LPC) simulation model, as well as a high-pressure compressor (HPC) model, metamodels of the compressor modules were developed. These surrogate models facilitate the assessment of how specific geometric changes impact the aerodynamic efficiency of the compressor, thereby enhancing our understanding of performance deterioration in operational aircraft engines.
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本研究通过数字化和参数化服役后的压气机叶片，采用实验设计方法生成合成叶片，结合CFD分析和集成到风扇/低压压气机及高压压气机模型中，开发了压气机模块的元模型。核心结论表明，几何参数如叶尖间隙、弦长等变化显著影响气动效率，有助于评估发动机性能退化。
relevance_reason: 论文涉及叶尖间隙对压气机性能的影响，与研究方向部分相关，但未深入探讨稳定性或机匣处理等核心主题。
innovation: 创新点在于建立了基于几何参数变化的合成叶片元模型，系统量化了叶片几何变化对压气机气动性能的影响，弥补了现有维护标准中缺乏气动评估准则的不足。
conclusions: 1. 叶尖间隙等几何参数是影响压气机气动效率的关键因素；2. 通过元模型可有效预测服役叶片性能退化，为发动机维护提供依据。

title: Predictions of Flow Distortions Inside a Serpentine Diffuser from Large-Eddy Simulations
abstract: This study examines the flow separation and the resulting pressure distortions at the exit plane of a serpentine diffuser operating at both subsonic and transonic conditions. Wall-modeled large-eddy simulations (WMLESs) using the charLES flow solver are performed at three exit-plane Mach numbers, [Formula: see text]. First, it is shown that the onset of flow separation inside a serpentine diffuser may experience strong, nonlocal history effects. A grid refinement study consisting of five grids (from 30 million to 3 billion cells) is conducted. The computations with the recently proposed dynamic tensor-coefficient Smagorinsky subgrid-scale and sensor-aided nonequilibrium wall models compare favorably with experimental measurements for the pressure recovery and azimuthal flow distortion at all Mach numbers. The predicted pressure recovery and azimuthal flow distortion are shown to be within 0.3 and 7%, respectively, of the experimental data. However, the simulations underpredict the maximum azimuthal distortion in comparison to the experiments for all conditions. Statistical comparisons of the dynamic azimuthal flow distortions suggest that the present LES reasonably captures the ring-averaged mean distortions and the statistical distributions of the distortion around the mean. Extreme events are underestimated by the present simulations, potentially highlighting that significantly longer integration times may be necessary.
summary_zh: 本研究通过壁面模型大涡模拟（WMLES）分析了蛇形扩压器在亚音速和跨音速条件下的流动分离和出口平面压力畸变。采用charLES求解器，在三个出口马赫数下进行模拟，网格从3000万到30亿单元。研究发现流动分离受强非局部历史效应影响，模拟结果与实验数据在压力恢复和方位角畸变方面吻合较好，但低估了最大畸变和极端事件。
method: 数值方法：壁面模型大涡模拟（WMLES），使用charLES求解器，工况包括三个出口马赫数，网格规模从3000万到30亿单元。
innovation: 创新点：结合动态张量系数Smagorinsky亚网格尺度模型和传感器辅助非平衡壁面模型，提高了对蛇形扩压器流动分离和畸变的预测精度。
conclusions: 关键结论：1. 蛇形扩压器流动分离受强非局部历史效应影响；2. 模拟预测的压力恢复和方位角畸变与实验数据偏差分别小于0.3%和7%，但最大畸变被低估。
limitations: 可能局限：模拟低估了极端事件，可能需要更长的积分时间以提高统计准确性。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及流动畸变和数值模拟，与压气机稳定性分析中的畸变进气相关，但非直接针对叶尖间隙或激盘模型。

title: On the Mechanism of Unsteady Tip Flow Occurrence in a Transonic Fan
abstract: Abstract The tip clearance flow, closely related to stable margin and efficiency, influences the performance of the fan/compressor in aeroengines. The unsteady tip flow in a high-speed transonic fan rotor is studied by numerical methods. This phenomenon is considered to be related to the flow instability. This article studied the occurrence and the development of the unsteady tip flow. The unsteady flow structure and the dynamic mode of pressure fluctuation are also demonstrated. The Richardson number in a turbomachinery environment, Riturbo number, is novelly proposed to study the probability of Kelvin–Helmholtz instability inducing the unsteady tip flow. It is found that after the fluctuation occurs, as the flowrate decreases, the Riturbo number shows a downward trend of a power function. When the stability provided by the centrifugal force gradually decreases, the tangential inertia force plays a major role, and the internal instability of the shear layer is prone to occur under the large disturbance caused by the vortex wave interference.
summary_zh: 本文通过数值方法研究了高速跨音速风扇转子中叶尖间隙非定常流动的发生与发展机制，重点关注流动不稳定性。创新性地提出了适用于涡轮机械环境的Richardson数（Riturbo数），用于评估Kelvin–Helmholtz不稳定性诱发非定常叶尖流动的概率。研究发现，随着流量减小，Riturbo数呈幂函数下降趋势，当离心力提供的稳定性减弱时，切向惯性力起主导作用，在涡波干扰引起的大扰动下，剪切层内部不稳定性易于发生。
relevance_reason: 论文直接研究压气机稳定性相关的叶尖间隙流动不稳定性，与研究方向高度契合。
innovation: 提出Riturbo数作为评估Kelvin–Helmholtz不稳定性在涡轮机械中诱发非定常叶尖流动的新指标。
conclusions: Riturbo数随流量减小呈幂函数下降；切向惯性力在稳定性减弱时主导流动，导致剪切层不稳定性。

title: Errors Downstream of a Rotor Due to Probe–Blade Row Interaction
abstract: Abstract This paper investigates the aerodynamic interaction between a row of compressor blades and a downstream cylindrical probe, using unsteady, three-dimensional simulations. The study demonstrates the probe influence on rotor performance as a function of probe size and rotor proximity, identifies the physical mechanisms driving rotor–probe interactions, and quantifies the resulting probe measurement errors. A probe downstream of a rotor row causes each blade passage to deviate periodically from the steady, axisymmetric characteristic, as they pass the probe. In this study, the largest rotor disturbance occurs for a probe of diameter 14% blade chord, located 30% chord downstream of the rotor trailing edge. The flow coefficient, ϕ, moving with the rotor passage, varies between −10.4% and +5.5% compared to a case with no downstream probe. The total-to-total pressure rise coefficient, ψtt, increases by up to 7.7%. These rotor–probe interaction effects are driven by the unsteady response of the rotor passage to the potential field of the probe. In the stationary frame, measurement error occurs because the probe is exposed to the disturbed flow field, leading to maximum average errors of Δϕ=+7.5% and Δψtt=+8%. The magnitude of the rotor disturbance decreases as the probe is moved away from the trailing edge of the blades and when probe size is reduced. Decreasing probe size close to the blade row reduces the rotor disturbance more than moving a large probe downstream. Including a stator blade row downstream of the probe leaves the physical mechanisms unchanged.
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本文通过非定常三维模拟，研究了压气机转子叶片与下游圆柱探针之间的气动相互作用。研究分析了探针尺寸和位置对转子性能的影响，揭示了转子-探针相互作用的物理机制，并量化了探针测量误差。核心结论表明，探针导致转子通道流动周期性偏离稳态轴对称特性，最大扰动发生在探针直径为14%弦长、位于转子尾缘下游30%弦长时，流动系数变化达-10.4%至+5.5%，总压升系数增加高达7.7%。
relevance_reason: 论文涉及压气机转子性能分析，但未直接聚焦于稳定性、叶尖间隙或机匣处理等核心方向。
innovation: 首次系统量化转子下游探针尺寸和位置对转子性能及测量误差的影响，揭示非定常势场响应是相互作用的主要机制。
conclusions: 探针直径14%弦长、位于转子尾缘下游30%弦长时，转子扰动最大，流动系数变化-10.4%至+5.5%，总压升系数增加7.7%。

title: Experimental Assessment of Squealer Tip Leakage Flow Structures in a Small-Core High-Speed Turbine
abstract: Abstract The unsteady tip leakage flows are accountable for aerodynamic losses that inherently hinder the performance of unshrouded turbines. Abatement of these penalties through the tightening of the operating tip clearance is highly relevant for new generations of small-core high-speed turbines, whose characteristic low aspect-ratio passages result in significant influence of secondary flow structures. A deep understanding of the development of tip leakage flows is paramount to defining a suitable transition toward tight clearance turbine configurations. In situ experimental measurements provide insights to build such comprehension and further serve to improve the numerical resolution fidelity of these highly detached unsteady flows delivered by commercially available computational tools. This article presents the experimental resolution of the unsteady pressure fields experienced in the over-tip casing of a small-core high-speed turbine. Fast response miniature pressure transducers captured at 2 MHz the casing's static pressure of the TRL6 small-core turbine demonstrator “STARR,” located in the Purdue Experimental Turbine Aerothermal Laboratory. The versatility of the facility for engine-representative testing allowed identifying the independent influence of the operating pressure ratio and rotational speed on the squealer tip leakage flow structures along a 60% tip clearance reduction. Besides the pressure differential across the blade, the resulting phase-locked average fields revealed two vortical structures along the squealer tip cavity as a secondary mechanism driving the tip leakage flows, with different shifting and combination trends along the operational envelope and tip clearance reduction.
summary_zh: 本文通过实验研究了小型核心高速涡轮中Squealer叶尖泄漏流的非定常压力场，使用2 MHz高速压力传感器在TRL6涡轮演示器上测量机匣静压，分析了压比和转速对泄漏流结构的独立影响，发现叶尖腔内的两个涡结构是驱动泄漏流的次要机制，并随工况和间隙减小呈现不同变化趋势。
method: 实验方法，使用2 MHz高速压力传感器测量机匣静压，工况包括不同压比、转速和60%叶尖间隙减小。
innovation: 首次在小型核心高速涡轮中实验解析Squealer叶尖泄漏流的非定常压力场，并独立评估压比和转速对泄漏流结构的影响。
conclusions: 叶尖泄漏流由压差和叶尖腔内两个涡结构共同驱动，这些结构随工况和间隙减小（60%减小）呈现不同偏移和组合趋势。
limitations: 仅基于机匣压力测量，未直接测量叶尖区域流动细节，可能缺乏全流场验证。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及叶尖间隙对流动结构的影响，与压气机稳定性分析中的叶尖间隙畸变相关，但直接针对涡轮而非压气机。

title: Reducing Low-Pressure Turbine Shroud Leakage Loss by Optimizing Leakage-Mainstream Interaction
abstract: Abstract In turbomachinery, mixing in the blade tip region between tip leakage and mainstream flow leads to irreversible entropy production, which is detrimental to efficiency. Despite extensive efforts to reduce leakage flows, the mixing process remains a significant source of performance loss, even at small mass flowrates. Introducing vane bleed holes (VBHs) into existing machines offers a promising solution to reduce these losses. Vane bleed holes operate by extracting the leakage flow from the rear section of the outer air seal cavity of the rotor blade and reintroducing it into the main gas path in the shroud region of the subsequent vane. This process significantly reduces mixing losses between leakage and mainstream flows and improves inflow conditions at the vane’s near-endwall region. The aim of this article is to present the numerical design and optimization of a vane bleed hole that will be experimentally integrated and tested in a 1.5-stage low-pressure turbine. Within the framework of this study, a VBH geometry is generated, parameterized, and optimized using a genetic algorithm to maximize isentropic efficiency. The study particularly focuses on the quantitative assessment of the loss-generating mechanisms using an entropy production-based decomposition of the losses, which is crucial for the development of future VBH improvement strategies.
summary_zh: 本文针对涡轮机械中叶尖泄漏流与主流混合导致的熵增损失问题，提出通过优化叶片引气孔（VBH）设计来减少损失。研究采用遗传算法对VBH几何进行参数化优化，基于熵产分解定量评估损失机制。核心结论显示，VBH能有效降低泄漏流与主流的混合损失，改善后续静叶近端壁区域流动条件，提高等熵效率。
relevance_reason: 论文涉及叶尖间隙泄漏流与主流混合的损失问题，与压气机稳定性相关，但主要针对涡轮而非压气机。
innovation: 创新点在于将叶片引气孔（VBH）集成到低压涡轮中，通过优化几何设计减少泄漏流与主流的混合损失，并基于熵产分解定量分析损失机制。
conclusions: 1. VBH设计能显著降低泄漏流与主流的混合损失，提高涡轮效率。2. 熵产分解方法为未来VBH改进策略提供了关键定量评估依据。

title: An Exception Algorithm to Ease Convergence in Multistage Turbomachinery Throughflow Calculations
abstract: Abstract Iterative solvers used in turbomachinery, spanning throughflow formulations and higher-order computational fluid dynamics (CFD), depend critically on how they are initialized. The starting state determines not only the number of iterations but often whether a solution is found at all when residuals are noisy or non-smooth. In such regimes, fast gradient updates can stall, oscillate, or violate bounds even when the underlying model is sound. This work introduces a solver-level exception algorithm that detects those failure signatures at run time and temporarily replaces the gradient step with a bounded, derivative-free fallback to reestablish a safe descent under strict feasibility limits. Control is returned to the fast path once a reliable reduction is found, preserving turnaround time in easy regions while adding robustness where the reference update is untrustworthy. The practical motivation is to reduce user workload and eliminate manual operating-point marching while enabling wider off-design coverage and characteristics traverses without a discernible accuracy or speed penalty. Although illustrated within a streamline curvature throughflow solver, the approach is general and can be interfaced with other throughflow methodologies and, more broadly, with higher-order CFD. Validation on single- and multistage axial-flow turbines shows improved robustness without a discernible accuracy or speed penalty within a state-of-the-art throughflow environment.
summary_zh: 本文提出一种求解器级异常算法，用于提高多级涡轮机械通流计算的收敛性。该方法在运行时检测梯度更新失败信号，临时采用无导数、有界回退步骤确保可行下降，随后恢复快速路径。验证表明，在单级和多级轴流涡轮中，该方法增强了鲁棒性，未显著影响精度或速度，适用于通流和高阶CFD求解器。
relevance_reason: 论文涉及涡轮机械通流计算的数值方法，与压气机稳定性分析间接相关，但未直接聚焦于核心研究方向。
innovation: 引入异常算法，在梯度更新不可靠时自动切换至无导数回退步骤，提升求解器鲁棒性，减少用户手动干预。
conclusions: 算法在轴流涡轮通流计算中提高了收敛鲁棒性，未引入明显的精度或速度损失。

title: Manifold-Preserving Guided Aerodynamic Modeling for Heterogeneous Data
abstract: Efficient and high-fidelity aerodynamic modeling can significantly accelerate the early-stage design process of aircraft. Recent studies have advanced aerodynamic modeling by utilizing high-dimensional heterogeneous data (such as surface pressure distribution) with autoencoders, achieving higher accuracy with fewer samples compared to traditional “end-to-end” approaches. This paper explores the mechanism behind this enhancement, exploiting manifold learning to extract valuable insights from high-dimensional data, thereby improving aerodynamic modeling accuracy. However, current research relies solely on a feature alignment in manifold space, which may introduce potential distortions and lead to modeling inaccuracies. To address this issue, we utilize a decoder model to constrain the latent space, which directly predicts high-dimensional pressure distributions from low-dimensional design or flight parameters, thereby preserving the manifold structure inherent in the original data. By integrating feature alignment with latent space constraint, we introduce a manifold-preserving aerodynamic modeling framework. A specially designed loss function operationalizes this approach, effectively capturing relevant information from high-dimensional pressure distributions. Transonic case studies involving two-dimensional airfoils and three-dimensional wings validate the superior modeling capabilities of the proposed method across different geometries and flow conditions. Additionally, visualizations are employed to compare this approach with existing aerodynamic modeling methods, further highlighting its advantages.
summary_zh: 本文提出一种基于流形保持的气动建模框架，用于处理高维异构数据（如表面压力分布）。通过结合特征对齐和潜在空间约束，利用解码器模型直接从低维设计或飞行参数预测压力分布，提高建模精度。在跨音速二维翼型和三维机翼案例中验证了方法的优越性，可视化对比突显其优势。
method: 数值方法，基于流形学习和解码器模型，工况为跨音速二维翼型和三维机翼流动。
innovation: 创新点在于引入流形保持机制，结合特征对齐与潜在空间约束，减少传统方法中的失真，提升高维数据建模精度。
conclusions: 1. 所提框架在跨音速条件下对二维翼型和三维机翼的气动建模精度优于现有方法。2. 通过可视化验证，方法能有效捕捉高维压力分布中的关键信息。
limitations: 可能局限于特定几何和流动条件，未涉及复杂三维流动或实际发动机环境。
relevance_reason: 论文涉及气动建模和数值方法，但与压气机稳定性、叶尖间隙等核心方向无直接关联。

title: Stability Enhancement With Controllable Speed Casing for Transonic Compressor Rotor in Different Speed Conditions
abstract: Abstract Controllable speed casing (CSC) represents an innovative approach to casing treatment designed to enhance the adaptability of casing treatment to the variable operating conditions of compressors. This study investigates the stability enhancement mechanism and effects of CSC at different rotor speed conditions in a transonic compressor. The results indicate that CSC can improve flow stability by reducing the intensity of the shock/tip leakage vortex interaction to varying degrees when the rotor operates at 80–110% design speed. Furthermore, the stability enhancement effect increases with the rotating speed of the CSC. However, when the rotor speed decreases to 60% design speed, causing the tip flow field to transition to subsonic flow, the rotation of the CSC aggravates the backflow within the tip leakage flow, resulting in the loss of efficacy of stability enhancement.
summary_zh: 本研究探讨了可控转速机匣（CSC）在跨音速压气机转子不同转速条件下的稳定性增强机制。通过分析CSC对激波/叶尖泄漏涡相互作用的减弱效果，发现当转子在80-110%设计转速运行时，CSC能不同程度提升流动稳定性，且效果随CSC转速增加而增强；但在60%设计转速下，CSC旋转加剧叶尖泄漏流回流，导致稳定性增强失效。
relevance_reason: 论文直接研究机匣处理对压气机稳定性的影响，涉及叶尖间隙流动，与核心方向高度相关。
innovation: 提出可控转速机匣（CSC）作为新型机匣处理，增强对压气机变工况的适应性，相比传统固定机匣处理更具灵活性。
conclusions: CSC在80-110%设计转速下能有效提升稳定性，效果随CSC转速增加；在60%设计转速下，CSC旋转导致叶尖泄漏流回流加剧，稳定性增强失效。

title: Experimental Investigation on the Surge Behaviors in the Centrifugal Compressor With Volute
abstract: Abstract The surge phenomenon seriously restricts the stable operating range of centrifugal compressors, and how to delay the occurrence of surge has always been a hot topic in centrifugal compressor research. For centrifugal compressors with volutes, the asymmetric structure of the volute can cause circumferential flow field distortion; however, its impact on the surge evolution behaviors has not been thoroughly studied. Based on the unsteady static pressure measurement and the wavelets analysis, the various time–frequency characteristics of disturbance signals during the surge evolution have been obtained, and the volute influence on the surge evolution behaviors at the different rotational speeds has been investigated. The wavelet analysis successfully resolves the complete time–frequency evolution throughout the deep surge cycle. At low speeds, the impact of the volute on the surge flow field in the centrifugal compressor is relatively small. The triggering instant of a deep surge can be accurately determined at certain speeds (80 krpm), whereas not at other speeds (50 krpm). At medium speeds, the strong volute-induced distortion leads to the significant circumferential nonuniformity in the surging flow field at the diffuser. At a certain circumferential position, the deep surge frequency disappears, while the stall and mild surge coexist at this circumferential position. At high speeds, the key component determining the compressor stability shifts from the impeller to the diffuser, leading to significant differences in the nonuniform surge behaviors at the diffuser compared to medium speeds. The research outcomes provide significant value for surge margin enhancement and surge simulation validation.
summary_zh: 本文通过非定常静压测量和小波分析，研究了带蜗壳离心压气机的喘振演化行为。研究发现，蜗壳引起的周向流场畸变在不同转速下对喘振行为有显著影响：中速时畸变导致扩压器喘振场非均匀性增强，高速时稳定性关键部件从叶轮转向扩压器，导致喘振行为差异。
relevance_reason: 论文聚焦离心压气机喘振行为，涉及稳定性分析和实验测量，与研究方向部分相关。
innovation: 首次系统研究了蜗壳不对称结构对离心压气机喘振演化行为的影响，结合小波分析揭示了不同转速下的时间-频率特性。
conclusions: 中速时蜗壳畸变导致扩压器喘振场显著非均匀性，高速时稳定性关键部件从叶轮转向扩压器。

title: Some Tests of the NATO AVT-298 SWiFT Model at Low Reynolds Numbers
abstract: Tests were carried out in a university-type atmospheric wind tunnel on a NATO-designed Swept Wing Flow Test (SWiFT) model at incompressible Mach numbers and Reynolds numbers ([Formula: see text]) ranging from [Formula: see text] to [Formula: see text]. The initial purpose was to compare the current results with those obtained in the National Transonic Facility (NTF) to assess the significance of [Formula: see text] on the physics of the flow. Following the excellent agreement in force balance data, the investigation expanded to study the leading-edge vortex (LEV) that impacts the pitch dependence on incidence and the flow unsteadiness after its liftoff from the surface, potentially leading to buffet. Oil flow visualization identified the liftoff location and its effect on pitch, while smoke visualization revealed the unsteadiness of the process. Quantitative analysis using particle image velocimetry (PIV) and hot wire anemometry exposed large periodic oscillations contributing to a turbulence level that is much larger than is known in a typical turbulent boundary layer on the verge of separation. Proper orthogonal decomposition (POD) confirmed the unsteady behavior at incidence angles exceeding vortex liftoff that raised the significance of a convective length scale and Strouhal number on this type of blended-wing–body configuration.
summary_zh: 该研究在低雷诺数下对北约设计的SWiFT模型进行了风洞实验，旨在评估雷诺数对流动物理的影响。通过力平衡数据对比、油流和烟雾可视化、PIV和热线风速仪测量以及POD分析，发现前缘涡离体导致流动不稳定性和大周期性振荡，湍流水平远超典型湍流边界层，强调了对流长度尺度和斯特劳哈尔数的重要性。
method: 实验方法，包括风洞测试、油流和烟雾可视化、PIV和热线风速仪测量，工况为不可压缩马赫数和雷诺数范围从[Formula: see text]到[Formula: see text]。
innovation: 在低雷诺数下系统研究SWiFT模型的前缘涡离体及其对流动不稳定性的影响，结合多种可视化与定量测量方法，突出对流长度尺度和斯特劳哈尔数在混合翼体构型中的重要性。
conclusions: 前缘涡离体导致流动不稳定性和大周期性振荡，湍流水平远超典型湍流边界层；POD分析确认在超过涡离体攻角时存在非定常行为，强调对流长度尺度和斯特劳哈尔数的影响。
limitations: 研究基于特定风洞和模型，可能未涵盖高雷诺数或可压缩流动效应，且实验条件有限。
relevance_reason: 该研究涉及流动不稳定性和稳定性分析，但与压气机叶尖间隙畸变等核心方向关联较弱。

title: An Aeroengine Internal Field Prediction Method Based on POD Dimensionality Reduction Integrated with Machine Learning
abstract: Abstract To overcome the limitations of one-dimensional calculation and achieve rapid prediction of internal fields in aeroengines, this study adopts a method combining Proper Orthogonal Decomposition and machine learning. The POD method is applied to reduce the dimensionality of three-dimensional numerical simulation results of an entire aeroengine, and the generated time matrix is then used for machine learning training. This approach successfully establishes models for predicting the Mach number, total temperature, and total pressure field within the operational range of the engine. In tests involving 1,000 operational conditions, the best prediction performance was achieved using the first 20 modes. For the predictions of the Mach number, total temperature, and total pressure fields, the Relative Root Mean Square Error (RRMSE) values were 0.1847, 0.1981, and 0.04252, respectively, while the R2 values reached 0.98267, 0.90155, and 0.99051. Compared to CFD calculations, this method saves 99.7% of the computational time. Simultaneously, this study demonstrates that improving the accuracy of the POD-ML method fundamentally requires enhancing the high-frequency feature extraction and synthesis capabilities within the ML model. This could be achieved, for example, by adopting frequency-band-specific feature extraction methods, or by optimizing the model architecture and training strategies. Furthermore, the high-order POD modes capture high-wavenumber spatial structures associated with strong local gradients. These structures, though energetically minor, govern the accuracy of peak mach number, temperature overshoot, and pressure recovery predictions, which are critical for engine safety and performance assessment.
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本研究采用POD降维与机器学习结合的方法，快速预测航空发动机内部场。通过POD对三维数值模拟结果降维，利用时间矩阵训练机器学习模型，成功预测马赫数、总温和总压场。在1000个工况测试中，前20个模态表现最佳，RRMSE和R2值均显示高精度，相比CFD节省99.7%计算时间。
relevance_reason: 论文涉及数值方法用于发动机内部场预测，与压气机气动热力学相关，但未直接聚焦稳定性或叶尖间隙等核心方向。
innovation: 将POD降维与机器学习集成，实现航空发动机内部场快速预测，显著提升计算效率。
conclusions: POD-ML方法在1000个工况下预测精度高，RRMSE值低至0.04252；相比CFD节省99.7%计算时间。

title: Dynamic Modeling and Experimental Insights in a 10 kWe Micro Gas Turbine Prototype: Experimental Validation and Testing
abstract: Abstract The growing need for decentralized and renewable power generation increases demand for flexible and highly efficient small-scale power units. Microgas turbines (mGTs) are strong candidates for combined heat and power applications in residential, commercial, and industrial sectors, typically delivering below 500 kWe. They can compensate for demand fluctuations in renewable-dominated grids, which can make them ideal for modern energy systems. However, their reliable operation under transient and part-load conditions needs to be assessed, calling for computationally efficient models that enable real-time performance prediction, control, and optimization. In this paper, the development and validation of a dynamic 0D real-time model of a 10 kWe mGT prototype is presented. The MATLAB/Simulink model integrates individual engine components—compressor, turbine, recuperator, combustor, and control system—through refined differential equations. This structure ensures both flexibility and fast computation while capturing key transient dynamics. The 10 kWe prototype, developed by MITIS SA, targets residential energy systems, biomethanization plants, and decentralized power for 5G networks. The system was experimentally validated, as key parameters were measured throughout the cycle under transient and part-load conditions. Key outputs such as shaft speed, turbine inlet temperature, and cycle pressures showed very good agreement with measurements, staying within sensor uncertainty ranges. This validated real-time software provides a modular foundation for future extensions, including humidification, two-stage cycle configurations, and advanced control strategies.
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本文开发并验证了一个10 kWe微型燃气轮机的动态0D实时模型，采用MATLAB/Simulink集成压缩机、涡轮等组件，通过微分方程捕捉瞬态动态。实验验证显示，轴速、涡轮入口温度等关键参数与测量值高度一致，为实时性能预测和控制提供了基础。
relevance_reason: 论文涉及压缩机组件建模和实验验证，但未深入探讨压气机稳定性、叶尖间隙畸变等核心方向。
innovation: 开发了基于MATLAB/Simulink的0D实时动态模型，集成发动机组件并实现快速计算，适用于瞬态和部分负载条件下的性能预测。
conclusions: 模型输出参数与实验测量值高度一致，保持在传感器不确定度范围内；该软件为未来扩展（如加湿、两阶段循环）提供了模块化基础。

title: Theoretical Investigation of Flow Instability in Axial Compressor
abstract: The hydrodynamic, acoustic, and thermal mode interactions affect flow instability in turbomachinery. The disturbance field is decomposed into component modes, and their interactions during throttling are analyzed. A theoretical model integrating resolvent analysis and momentum potential theory is established. Resolvent analysis in an axial compressor is validated via rotating inlet distortion experiments and spectral proper orthogonal decomposition. Resolvent analysis captures the flow structure and establishes links between them and resolvent modes. Amplified perturbation structures trigger stall during throttling. Resolvent analysis identifies the most sensitive forcing frequencies along the throttling process. Response modes are divided into hydrodynamic, acoustic, and thermal components based on these frequencies. To clarify the perturbation energy transport mechanisms, the properties and dynamic interactions of component modes in the decomposed fields are analyzed. This reveals that hydrodynamic–thermal interaction is the dominant contributor to total fluctuating enthalpy. Additionally, interactions between hydrodynamic/thermal components and Coriolis acceleration are key drivers of stall inception, especially in amplifying flow instabilities at the tip region.
summary_zh: 本文通过结合解析子分析和动量势理论，建立了轴流压气机流动不稳定性的理论模型。利用旋转进气畸变实验和谱本征正交分解验证了模型，揭示了在节流过程中，流体动力-热相互作用是总波动焓的主要贡献者，且流体动力/热分量与科里奥利加速度的相互作用是失速起始的关键驱动因素，特别是在叶尖区域放大流动不稳定性。
relevance_reason: 论文直接研究压气机流动不稳定性和失速机理，与研究方向核心高度相关。
innovation: 创新性地整合解析子分析与动量势理论，用于分解扰动场并分析模态相互作用，揭示了流体动力-热相互作用在失速起始中的主导作用。
conclusions: 流体动力-热相互作用是总波动焓的主要贡献者；流体动力/热分量与科里奥利加速度的相互作用是失速起始的关键驱动因素。

title: Aerodynamic Interaction Between Main Annulus Flow and Injected Secondary Air in Transonic High-Pressure Turbine Stage
abstract: Abstract This study explored the effects of secondary air blowing on the main annulus flow field and the performance of a transonic high-pressure turbine (HPT) experimentally and numerically. The test section featured a single-stage, unshrouded turbine with a blading consistent with modern low aspect ratio HPTs. The full annular, rotating, continuous turbine test rig was used for the whole testing campaign. This resulted in the most accurate and unparalleled matching of the similarity parameters to reality for both the primary and secondary air streams. An elaborate secondary air system built into the hardware enabled it to simulate all the critical coolant/purge air streams typically found in advanced hot sections. Detailed three-dimensional flow field and efficiency measurements for various secondary air flowrates were conducted. A complete set of numerical simulations was conducted in parallel with testing to assess how effectively they capture the flow physics, particularly the interaction between the mainflow and ejected secondary air streams. The rotor exit survey in the experiment suggests that film-coolant ejection from stator vanes intensifies passage vortices in the cascade, especially at the hub. Rotor blade film-cooling and rotor forward purge air appear to have the same enhancing effect on rotor-induced passage vortices. However, the vortex intensity in the region of stator–rotor vortex interaction is not enhanced further or even suppressed. Blade coolant also appears to enhance tip leakage flow, which then reduces work extraction. The enhanced tip leakage discharges into the mainstream, boosting the tip clearance vortices. Coolant blown from the over-tip casing also appears to enhance the passage vortices at the tip; however, it also has a positive effect, diminishing the tip leakage vortices.
summary_zh: 本研究通过实验和数值模拟，探讨了二次空气喷射对跨音速高压涡轮主环流场和性能的影响。研究对象为单级无罩涡轮，模拟了现代低展弦比高压涡轮的叶片设计。核心发现包括：静子叶片冷却剂喷射增强了通道涡，尤其是轮毂处；转子叶片冷却和转子前缘吹气增强了转子诱导的通道涡，但抑制了静子-转子涡相互作用区的涡强度；叶片冷却剂增强了叶尖泄漏流，降低了做功能力，而机匣吹气则增强了叶尖通道涡并减弱了叶尖泄漏涡。
method: 采用实验和数值模拟相结合的方法，基于全环形旋转连续涡轮试验台，模拟了多种二次空气流量工况。
innovation: 创新点在于使用全环形旋转试验台精确匹配相似参数，并模拟了先进热段中所有关键冷却剂/吹气气流，提供了前所未有的实验数据匹配度。
conclusions: 关键结论：静子叶片冷却剂喷射显著增强通道涡强度（尤其在轮毂处）；叶片冷却剂增强叶尖泄漏流，降低涡轮做功能力，而机匣吹气能减弱叶尖泄漏涡。
limitations: 可能局限：研究聚焦于特定涡轮设计，未广泛探讨不同几何或操作条件下的通用性。
relevance_reason: 论文涉及叶尖间隙流动和涡相互作用，与压气机稳定性分析中的叶尖间隙畸变和流动稳定性部分相关。

title: Analysis of Radial Inlet Distortion on Transonic Fan Performance
abstract: Abstract Improving fan design and performance prediction requires an understanding of the impacts of inlet distortion. Using full-annulus unsteady Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes (URANS) simulations, the effects of hub and tip radial distortions on the Air Force Research Laboratory (AFRL) Rotor 4 fan are analyzed. Overall performance, total pressure (Pt) distortion transfer, and total temperature (Tt) distortion generation are presented and compared for three operating points: near-stall, design, and choke. Results from twelve simulations are presented and analyzed. Hub radial inlet distortion magnitudes of 15% and 20%, and a tip radial distortion of 15% magnitude were investigated. The 15% hub radial profile increased stall margin by 18.45% compared with the clean inlet. The 15% tip radial profile decreased the stall margin by 89.47%. An intensity distortion descriptor is used to quantify levels of distortion transfer and generation through the fan. It is shown that hub radial profiles resulted in more significant Pt distortion attenuation and less Tt distortion generation through the rotor than the tip radial profile.
summary_zh: 本文通过全环非定常雷诺平均Navier-Stokes（URANS）模拟，分析了轮毂和叶尖径向畸变对AFRL Rotor 4风扇性能的影响。研究发现，15%轮毂径向畸变使失速裕度增加18.45%，而15%叶尖径向畸变则降低89.47%，表明畸变类型对稳定性和畸变传递有显著差异。
method: 采用全环非定常雷诺平均Navier-Stokes（URANS）数值模拟，研究轮毂和叶尖径向畸变（15%和20%幅度）在近失速、设计和堵塞工况下的影响。
innovation: 创新点在于系统比较轮毂与叶尖径向畸变对风扇性能的差异影响，并使用强度畸变描述符量化畸变传递和生成，为畸变进气下的稳定性预测提供新见解。
conclusions: 关键结论：15%轮毂径向畸变提升失速裕度18.45%，而15%叶尖径向畸变降低失速裕度89.47%；轮毂畸变导致更显著的总压畸变衰减和较少的总温畸变生成。
limitations: 可能局限：仅基于数值模拟，缺乏实验验证；研究限于特定风扇模型和畸变幅度，未涵盖更广泛工况或畸变类型。
relevance_reason: 该研究直接涉及叶尖畸变对稳定性的影响，与用户课题预测叶尖畸变下的稳定裕度高度相关。

title: A Unified Framework for Compressor Stall Inception
abstract: Abstract This article presents a first-of-a-kind description of compressor rotating stall inception that unifies the two different routes to stall reported in the literature over the past four decades. A low-order dynamic system model, an actuator disk analysis, is shown to capture these two transient, stall inception behaviors, namely, modes: the growth of small amplitude, long length scale (on order of compressor circumference), sinusoidal velocity perturbations, versus spikes: short length scale (on order of blade pitch) velocity disturbances with fast, nonlinear growth. The analysis demonstrates that the two distinctly different processes are on a continuum of compressor dynamic behavior and can be captured by the same unifying framework. Their features, including the different length and time scales, are revealed without explicit modeling of the blades. The differentiator for stall inception behaviour is shown to be the slope of the compressor total-to-static pressure rise characteristic at flows below that corresponding to the peak pressure rise, i.e., to the left of the peak. Small positive slopes to the left of the peak lead to the growth of modes into fully developed rotating stall cells. Large positive slopes lead to a more rapid evolution of spikes into stall cells. The actuator disk simulations indicate that these two types of transient fluid motions bound a range of stall inception behaviors that depend on the compressor pressure rise characteristic slope. The article quantifies the slopes that set the stall inception behavior. Data from compressor experiments and full annulus unsteady Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes simulations are used to connect the shapes of radially varying compressor characteristics, in the rotating stall regime, to flow features including blade leading-edge and corner separations. The experiments and full annulus computations confirm that the low-order model successfully captures the transient flows and physical mechanisms of rotating stall inception.
summary_zh: 本文提出一个统一框架，通过低阶动态系统模型（作动盘分析）描述压气机旋转失速起始，统一了文献中两种不同的失速起始路径：模式（小振幅、长尺度正弦扰动）和尖峰（短尺度、非线性快速扰动）。研究表明，这两种行为是压气机动态行为的连续体，取决于压力上升特性在峰值左侧的斜率，小正斜率导致模式发展，大正斜率导致尖峰快速演化。实验和全环非定常雷诺平均Navier-Stokes模拟验证了模型的有效性。
relevance_reason: 论文核心研究压气机稳定性，直接涉及失速起始机理和稳定性分析，与研究方向高度一致。
innovation: 首次统一了压气机旋转失速起始的两种不同路径（模式和尖峰），通过低阶模型揭示其连续体特性，无需显式叶片建模。
conclusions: 失速起始行为由压力上升特性在峰值左侧的斜率决定：小正斜率导致模式发展，大正斜率导致尖峰快速演化。

title: Three-Dimensional Flow Field Characterization and Blockage Effects in an Open-Jet Probe Calibration Wind Tunnel
abstract: Abstract This article presents a detailed investigation into the 3-D flow field characterization and blockage effects in an open-jet probe calibration wind tunnel, utilizing a wide array of advanced measurement techniques. The design of the calibration wind tunnel, along with the sensor setup and associated uncertainties, is thoroughly described. An analysis of Mach number calculation errors highlights the unexpectedly high significance of humidity measurement in achieving accurate results. This study employs hot-wire anemometry, five-hole probes, Kiel probes, and stereo particle image velocimetry to characterize the flow in the measurement section of the probe calibration wind tunnel. These techniques are used to evaluate both the Mach number and the turbulence intensity distribution, revealing a high-quality flow field. Furthermore, stereo particle image velocimetry and computational fluid dynamics analyses are integrated to explore the interaction between the core jet of the calibration wind tunnel and the probe. An experimental investigation examines the occurrence of blockage effects, such as upstream flow disturbances caused by probe-nozzle interactions, across varying Mach numbers and probe diameters. From this analysis, an empirical equation is proposed to predict the onset of blockage, providing a valuable tool to avoid suboptimal calibration conditions.
summary_zh: 本文详细研究了开放射流探针校准风洞的三维流场特性和阻塞效应，采用热线风速仪、五孔探针、Kiel探针和立体粒子图像测速等先进测量技术。通过实验和计算流体动力学分析，揭示了探针与喷嘴相互作用引起的上游流动扰动，并提出了预测阻塞起始的经验方程，为优化校准条件提供工具。
relevance_reason: 论文涉及风洞流场测量和阻塞效应，与压气机气动热力学中的实验测量部分相关，但未直接聚焦于核心研究方向如稳定性或叶尖间隙。
innovation: 结合多种先进测量技术和CFD分析，系统研究探针校准风洞的阻塞效应，并提出预测阻塞起始的经验方程。
conclusions: 湿度测量对马赫数计算精度有显著影响；探针直径和马赫数变化会导致上游流动扰动，需避免次优校准条件。

title: Predicting Endwall Corner Separation in Compressor Cascades Using RANS: Influence of Transition Treatment and Inflow Conditions
abstract: Abstract Corner separations are a complex physical phenomenon that significantly affects the off-design operation of axial compressors, contributing to instability and limiting their operating range. At the same time, most Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes (RANS) models struggle to capture the interaction of endwall and airfoil boundary layers accurately, leading to incorrect predictions of aerodynamic performance, local blade loading, and instability mechanisms. This article evaluates the predictive capabilities of state-of-the-art, steady-state RANS modeling approaches for the aerodynamics of the linear compressor cascade of the École Centrale de Lyon. The evaluation is based on comprehensive studies of the computational fluid dynamics setup, focusing on the tripping process of the blade boundary layers, endwall treatment, and inflow boundary conditions. An optimized RANS setup is presented, featuring a meshed trip for the blade boundary layers, fully-turbulent endwalls, and a corrected inflow angle. This setup yields accurate predictions of static pressure distributions at various spanwise positions, including in direct proximity to the endwall, and a precise representation of the total-pressure losses induced by corner separations downstream of the cascade. Boosting the momentum of the fluid in endwall boundary layers, either by prescribing fully-turbulent endwall boundary layers or neglecting endwalls in the inflow conditions, improves the prediction of loaded operating points, enhances the blade loading, and makes the suction-sided boundary layer more resistant toward diffusion. A comparison with other RANS- and large eddy simulations-based results of this test case from the literature highlights the improved prediction capabilities of the proposed strategies. This study identifies the limitations of the RANS simulations concerning corner separation-induced vortex trajectories and the pitchwise spread of loss distributions downstream of the blade, providing a foundation for future improvements in the RANS modeling.
summary_zh: 本文评估了稳态RANS模型在预测线性压气机叶栅端壁角区分离方面的能力，通过优化计算流体动力学设置，包括叶片边界层触发、端壁处理和进气条件。研究表明，采用全湍流端壁或忽略端壁进气条件可提升加载工况预测精度，增强叶片载荷，并改善吸力面边界层抗扩散能力。
relevance_reason: 论文涉及压气机流动稳定性分析，与研究方向部分相关，但未直接聚焦叶尖间隙或机匣处理。
innovation: 优化RANS设置，结合叶片边界层触发和端壁处理，提升角区分离预测精度，相比传统方法更准确模拟损失分布。
conclusions: 优化RANS设置能准确预测端壁附近静压分布和角区分离引起的总压损失；全湍流端壁处理增强叶片载荷和边界层稳定性。

title: A Deterioration Predictor Model of Performance Parameters of Turbine Modules in Aeroengines
abstract: Abstract Aeroengines inevitably deteriorate over their service life due to the accumulation of flight hours under various routes, ambient conditions, and thrust demands. Current methods estimate the health parameters, such as flow capacity and efficiency, for different aeroengine modules and perform their statistical evaluation. Although degradation is embedded within their results, these methods do not model individually the physical mechanisms causing the deterioration of specific modules. To address this gap, we propose a deterioration predictor model to calculate degraded performance parameters over the flight hours of a turbine section. Initially, we developed degradation functions to correlate deterioration mechanisms with their effects using information available in the open literature. We then developed and validated an off-design performance calculator to predict the degradation's impact on axial turbine performance, choosing proven loss models capable of incorporating the effects of deterioration. Finally, we predicted the degraded performance map of a turbine by combining the effects of geometry variation, surface roughness, and tip clearance. Our results indicate that geometry variation is the primary driver for changes in turbine performance. This deterioration predictor model demonstrates how the performance of a turbine evolves through flight hours, providing valuable information to enhance the predictive ability of aeroengine degradation.
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种航空发动机涡轮模块性能退化预测模型，通过结合几何变化、表面粗糙度和叶尖间隙等退化机制，开发退化函数和损失模型，预测涡轮性能随飞行小时的变化。研究发现几何变化是涡轮性能变化的主要驱动因素，为发动机退化预测提供了新方法。
method: 基于文献信息的理论建模和数值模拟，结合退化函数和损失模型预测涡轮性能，主要工况参数包括飞行小时、几何变化、表面粗糙度和叶尖间隙。
innovation: 与现有统计方法相比，创新在于物理建模退化机制，直接关联几何变化、表面粗糙度和叶尖间隙对涡轮性能的影响，提升退化预测的物理基础。
conclusions: 几何变化是涡轮性能退化的主要驱动因素；模型能有效预测涡轮性能随飞行小时的演变，为发动机健康管理提供支持。
limitations: 模型基于公开文献数据，可能未覆盖所有退化机制或实际发动机变工况，验证范围有限。
relevance_reason: 论文涉及叶尖间隙作为退化因素，与用户研究方向部分相关，但核心是涡轮性能退化预测而非压气机稳定性。

title: Experimental Study of Flow in an Industrial Gas Turbine Intake System Under Different Operating Conditions
abstract: Abstract The intake system of industrial gas turbines significantly impacts compressor performance due to loss and flow distortion. The flow characteristics of the intake system of an industrial gas turbine have been investigated experimentally and numerically in this paper. A two-dimensional (2D) particle image velocimetry (PIV) system, along with pressure probes, is used to obtain the velocity and total pressure at the intake system outlet. The results show that PIV-measured data are in good agreement with the data obtained from the five-hole pressure probe, indicating the reliability of the experimental results. Experiments are conducted under different flow conditions, showing that the mass flow rate has minimal influence on the cross-flow velocity pattern and flow angle at the intake system outlet. A pair of counter-rotating vortices is present in the intake system. Both the vortices and the struts serve as the two main sources of the swirl flow distortion. Higher mass flow rates are associated with increased total pressure loss, mainly caused by the struts, the counter-rotating vortices, and their interplay. Furthermore, numerical simulation accurately predicts the flow pattern at the outlet of the intake system, with the generalized k–ω model (GEKW) turbulence model demonstrating superior performance compared to other turbulence models.
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本文通过实验和数值模拟研究了工业燃气轮机进气系统的流动特性。采用二维PIV系统和五孔压力探针测量出口速度和总压，验证了实验可靠性。研究发现，质量流量对出口横流速度分布和流动角影响较小，进气系统中存在一对反向旋转涡旋，涡旋和支柱是旋流畸变的主要来源，高流量下总压损失增加。数值模拟中GEKW湍流模型表现优异。
method: 实验采用二维PIV和五孔压力探针测量，结合数值模拟（GEKW湍流模型），研究不同流量工况下的进气系统流动。
innovation: 结合PIV和压力探针验证实验可靠性，明确涡旋和支柱作为旋流畸变的主要来源，并评估GEKW湍流模型在进气系统模拟中的优越性。
conclusions: 1. 质量流量对进气系统出口横流速度分布和流动角影响较小；2. 高流量下总压损失增加，主要由支柱和反向旋转涡旋及其相互作用引起。
limitations: 研究基于二维PIV测量，可能未完全捕捉三维流动细节；未涉及进气畸变对压气机稳定性的直接影响。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及进气畸变对压气机性能的影响，与压气机稳定性分析相关，但未直接探讨叶尖间隙或机匣处理等核心方向。

title: Interaction Effects of Fan With Short Aero-Intake: A Multi-Objective Optimization Study With Modeling of Flow Coupling
abstract: Abstract The stronger coupling between the turbomachinery and the air inlet becomes more relevant in next-generation turbofan engines with low-pressure ratio fans and compact nacelles. This study presents a numerical investigation of the interaction between a transonic fan and a short aero-intake in terms of intake geometric design and fan modeling. The inlet design space is first explored in cruise and takeoff conditions, and the three-dimensional geometry is optimized in a multipoint and multi-objective formulation using a Bayesian solver to minimize the inlet distortion at takeoff and the total pressure losses in cruise. Flow coupling at high incidence is ensured through a body force model of the fan. The Pareto frontier highlights the conflicting nature of intake design between high incidence and high-speed performance. A selected individual from the Pareto is further examined by running unsteady full-annulus sliding-mesh simulations at a high angle of attack upon inlet separation. The detailed comparison of the flow field and the turbomachinery performance indicates an accurate reproduction of the inlet flow coupling through the body force model. Although lacking in fully replicating specific flow features near the tip of the blade, the simplified method allows reconstructing the blade response to inlet distortion and capturing the main flow structures. The study thus highlights the suitability of the adopted approach to simulate the mutual interaction between the fan and the inlet flow and provides an efficient method for the optimization of short-intake designs.
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本研究通过数值方法探究了跨音速风扇与短进气道之间的相互作用，采用贝叶斯优化器进行多点多目标优化，以降低起飞时的进气畸变和巡航时的总压损失。研究发现，进气道设计在高迎角与高速性能间存在冲突，体力模型能准确模拟流动耦合，但无法完全复制叶尖附近的特定流动特征。
method: 数值研究，使用贝叶斯优化器进行多点多目标优化，工况包括巡航和起飞条件，采用体力模型模拟风扇流动耦合。
innovation: 结合贝叶斯优化与体力模型，高效模拟风扇与进气道间的流动相互作用，为短进气道设计提供优化方法。
conclusions: 进气道设计在高迎角与高速性能间存在冲突；体力模型能准确模拟流动耦合，但无法完全复制叶尖附近的流动特征。
limitations: 体力模型无法完全复制叶尖附近的特定流动特征，可能影响局部流动细节的准确性。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及畸变进气下的风扇响应和体力模型应用，与压气机稳定性建模部分相关。

title: Consolidating Data for Boundary Layer Transition Onset Under the Influence of Freestream Turbulence and Pressure Gradients
abstract: Abstract Laminar-turbulent transition in boundary layers is important to turbomachinery flows. Accurate prediction of the boundary layer state is necessary when calculating entropy generation and heat transfer rates on blades and end walls. Current practice uses a mix of empirical correlations, experimental testing, and the experience of the designer to account for transition; however, in complex flows at the decreasing Reynolds numbers found in modern machines, prior knowledge is insufficient. As such, there remains a need for correlations that can be fed into low-order methods for routine use in design. Many such correlations are available; however, the data they are based on are limited, particularly for flows with strong pressure gradients and high freestream turbulence such as those found in turbomachinery. This work consolidates existing literature data for boundary layer transition onset under the influence of freestream turbulence and pressure gradients. Details of the methods used in the original studies are discussed. Data are compared to existing correlations and areas with insufficient data are identified, along with suggestions for future work to fill gaps in the literature.
summary_zh: 该研究综述了自由流湍流和压力梯度影响下边界层转捩起始的现有文献数据，聚焦于叶轮机械流动。通过整合数据，比较现有关联式，识别数据不足区域，并提出未来研究方向，旨在为低阶设计方法提供更准确的转捩预测关联式。
method: 文献综述方法，基于现有实验和数值研究数据，主要工况参数包括高自由流湍流和强压力梯度。
innovation: 创新点在于系统整合了叶轮机械复杂流动条件下的转捩数据，填补了高湍流和强压力梯度下关联式数据不足的空白。
conclusions: 关键结论：现有转捩关联式在强压力梯度和高自由流湍流条件下数据有限，需进一步实验验证；建议未来研究针对低雷诺数流动进行补充。
limitations: 局限：依赖二手数据，可能缺乏统一实验标准，且未涉及具体叶尖间隙或机匣处理效应。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及边界层转捩对叶轮机械流动稳定性的影响，与压气机稳定性分析相关。

title: Performance Sensitivity of a Grooved Tip Seal to Manufacturing and Operational Geometry Deviations
abstract: Abstract The next generation of narrowbody commercial aircraft requires advancements in small-core gas turbines to reduce fuel consumption. However, small-core turbines include a number of physical features which are challenging to scale, including larger relative clearances between the rotating and stationary parts than the current power plants for this class of aircraft. These larger relative clearances have deleterious effects on high-pressure turbine efficiency and durability when compared to other state-of-the-art engines, which reduce the engine thermal efficiency and engine time on wing due to greater turbine thermal loads. The application of axisymmetric grooves in the stationary casing (or tip seal) over the turbine blades is a promising method for mitigating both of these effects, and past work has identified optimal designs for further investigation. In this computational study, one such optimal design is explored in greater detail, and practical considerations of grooved turbine casings are evaluated, including: the effect of groove alignment, manufacturing limitations, and wear of the tip seal due to thermal stresses. The groove geometries were applied to a simulation of the National Experimental Turbine (NExT), a high-pressure turbine design incorporating industry-standard geometric features and operated at engine-relevant conditions and small-core relevant tip clearances. Through this study, deviations in axial alignment of the groove and manufacturing artifacts had little impact on turbine performance; however, simulated wear reduced the efficiency of the turbine rotor below that of the unmodified tip seal—thereby negating the initial benefits provided by the grooves. Despite these performance behaviors, the heat load into the blade tip was still lower with the worn grooves than the ungrooved baseline configuration, indicating that the grooved tip seal would likely maintain its durability benefit throughout its useful life. These results lay a foundation for understanding how optimized designs perform when subjected to realistic deployment influences, such as manufacturing constraints, operational variations, and degradation over their lifecycle.
summary_zh: 本研究针对小型核心燃气轮机中高压涡轮叶尖间隙增大的问题，通过数值模拟方法评估了轴对称凹槽机匣处理（或叶尖密封）的性能敏感性。研究对象为NExT高压涡轮设计，在发动机相关工况和小核心相关叶尖间隙下进行模拟。核心发现包括：凹槽轴向对齐和制造偏差对涡轮性能影响较小，但模拟磨损会降低涡轮转子效率，抵消凹槽的初始效益；然而，磨损凹槽仍能降低叶片尖端热负荷，保持耐久性优势。
method: 数值模拟方法，基于NExT高压涡轮设计，在发动机相关工况和小核心相关叶尖间隙下进行CFD分析。
innovation: 创新点在于评估轴对称凹槽机匣处理在实际部署中的性能敏感性，包括制造偏差、操作变化和磨损影响，为优化设计提供实用指导。
conclusions: 凹槽轴向对齐和制造偏差对涡轮性能影响可忽略；模拟磨损使涡轮转子效率低于未修改叶尖密封，但磨损凹槽仍能降低叶片尖端热负荷，保持耐久性。
limitations: 研究基于数值模拟，未进行实验验证；仅针对特定涡轮设计，可能不适用于其他配置。
relevance_reason: 论文涉及叶尖间隙和机匣处理，与压气机稳定性领域部分相关，但主要针对涡轮而非压气机。

title: A Multi-Scale Representation of Turbulence Generation in Compressor Flows
abstract: Abstract Turbomachinery flows exhibit strong unsteadiness, characterized by periodic wake-related disturbances superimposed on background turbulence. The turbulence generation mechanisms in these flows involve multiple interacting scales, making accurate modeling challenging. Developing robust transition models capable of capturing the multi-modal nature of these processes is crucial for accurately predicting the overall performance of turbomachinery components. In our previous work (GT2024-128738), we employed a turbulent event recognition technique that was used on high-fidelity data of a compressor cascade under steady inflow conditions to classify individual flow features as “laminar” and “turbulent” depending on their role in transition. This allowed us to characterize features such as streaks and Kelvin–Helmholtz roll-ups in a manner that is consistent and data-driven. In this work, we consider other high-fidelity scale-resolving datasets of compressor blades (NACA65) under unsteady inflow conditions. This work aims at testing whether laminar and turbulent classification is appropriate for this class of problems. For that purpose, a multi-scale analysis of the turbulence generation mechanisms is adopted. This is achieved by clustering flow scales using an unsupervised data-driven method. Following that, turbulence production for different scale clusters is examined. Data reported in the article show that a low-dimensional multi-scale representation of turbulence generation mechanisms can be achieved for compressor flows. The approach discussed here has potential to extend the concept of two-scale laminar-turbulent kinetic energy models, especially with regards to incorporating the impact of incoming wakes into the Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes framework.
summary_zh: 该研究针对压气机流动中的湍流生成机制，采用多尺度分析方法，基于非定常进气条件下的高保真数据，通过无监督聚类技术对流动尺度进行分组，实现了湍流生成的低维多尺度表征，并探讨了将尾迹影响纳入雷诺平均Navier-Stokes框架的潜力。
method: 数值方法，基于高保真尺度解析数据，在非定常进气条件下对NACA65压气机叶片进行多尺度分析。
innovation: 创新点在于采用无监督数据驱动方法对流动尺度进行聚类，扩展了传统的两尺度层流-湍流动能模型，以更精确地捕捉湍流生成的多模态特性。
conclusions: 关键结论包括：低维多尺度表示能有效描述压气机流动中的湍流生成机制；该方法有助于将尾迹影响整合到雷诺平均Navier-Stokes模型中。
limitations: 可能局限在于仅基于特定叶片（NACA65）数据，未广泛验证于其他几何或工况，且依赖高保真数据获取。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及压气机流动稳定性分析，但未直接聚焦于叶尖间隙畸变或机匣处理等核心方向。

title: Impact of Fan Aerodynamics on Inlet Distortion at Crosswind
abstract: Abstract This study offers a holistic perspective on fan and intake distortion interaction in crosswind conditions, addressing the factors influencing fan stability during ground operations. Although prior research has extensively examined individual aspects such as intake length, fan operating points, and crosswind speed, a comprehensive analysis encompassing all these parameters remains unexplored. Using two intakes with different length-to-diameter (L/D) ratios (0.5 and 0.25) and a 3D unsteady computational fluid dynamics (CFD) model, this paper investigates how the fan operating point (in terms of mass flow, pressure ratio, and proximity to the stall line) influences intake separation and how the resulting distortion affects the fan operation. The results show that for both intakes, the primary parameter of fan operation on intake flow is the mean mass flow. The intake flow remains largely unaffected by the fan pressure ratio or its proximity to the stall line, as long as the mass flow is kept constant. As the fan speed (mass flow) increases to a critical value, a shock forms at the intake lip, triggering flow separation within the intake. The shorter intake moves the onset of separation to a higher mass flow. However, the increase in critical mass flow is not driven by fan suction, as often suggested in the literature, but is caused by the repositioning of the spinner closer to the intake highlight, which redistributes flow radially near the intake lip. This observation was validated using an aspirated intake, which showed a similar conclusion to the powered configuration provided the hub line remained unchanged. These findings support the use of aspirated intakes for wind tunnel tests of intake designs under crosswind conditions. However, the fan’s response to the same level of distortion depends on the fan design and operating point. The data from aspirated intake measurements can be used as inlet conditions for fan (numerical and experimental) testing, retaining the effect of the operating point.
summary_zh: 本研究采用三维非定常CFD模型，分析不同长径比进气道（L/D=0.5和0.25）在侧风条件下风扇运行点（质量流量、压比、接近失速线）对进气道分离的影响。核心结论表明，进气道流动主要受平均质量流量控制，风扇压比或接近失速线影响较小；当质量流量增至临界值时，进气道唇口形成激波引发分离，短进气道使分离起始点移至更高质量流量，且临界质量流量增加由整流罩位置变化而非风扇吸力驱动。
relevance_reason: 论文涉及风扇稳定性分析和畸变进气，与压气机稳定性研究方向部分相关，但未直接聚焦叶尖间隙或机匣处理。
innovation: 首次综合评估进气道长度、风扇运行点和侧风速度对风扇稳定性的影响，揭示临界质量流量增加机制与风扇吸力无关，而是整流罩位置变化导致。
conclusions: 进气道流动主要受平均质量流量控制，风扇压比或接近失速线影响有限；短进气道使分离起始点移至更高质量流量，临界质量流量增加由整流罩位置变化驱动。

title: Compressor Stator Leading Edge Instrumentation
abstract: Abstract Leading edge instrumentation is commonly used for performance measurement in high-speed multi-stage compressor or whole engine testing. Due to spatial constraints and calibration requirements, it is infeasible to use the more accurate methods of a roving multi-hole probe or multi-headed rakes. In this work the parasitic losses and measurement accuracy of both Kiel shrouded, and bare Pitot probes is studied on the leading edge of a compressor stator. The trade-off between these two quantities with four different relative sizes of probe is measured in a single stage experimental compressor rig and supported with numerical calculations. Several comparisons are made to help guide an instrumentation designer to select the best instrumentation for their machines: whether the leadouts can be routed on the pressure side of the blade or should be internal to the geometry; the design of the intake of the Kiel shroud itself; and whether or not a Kiel shroud is even needed in a compressor application. In each case, the effect on the local operating point of the stage is examined as well as the detailed flow physics on the instrumented blade itself
summary_zh: 本文研究了压缩机静子前缘的基尔罩和裸皮托管探针的寄生损失和测量精度，通过单级实验台和数值计算分析了四种不同相对尺寸探针的权衡。核心结论包括：探针尺寸和类型对局部工作点和流动物理有显著影响，为仪器设计者提供了选择最佳探针的指导，例如探针布置位置和基尔罩的必要性。
relevance_reason: 论文涉及压缩机测试和流动分析，但未直接聚焦于压气机稳定性、叶尖间隙畸变或机匣处理等核心方向。
innovation: 比较了基尔罩和裸皮托管探针在压缩机静子前缘的应用，结合实验与数值方法，系统评估了探针尺寸对测量精度和寄生损失的权衡，为压缩机测试中的仪器选择提供了新见解。
conclusions: 1. 探针尺寸和类型显著影响压缩机级的局部工作点和流动特性；2. 在某些压缩机应用中，基尔罩可能不是必需的，取决于探针布置和设计。

title: Experimental and Numerical Study on Flow and Heat Transfer Characteristics of a Dual-Stage Brush Seal With Pressure Equalization Holes on Backing Plate
